## Now
<!-- narrative:start -->
**Focus:** First real-art pass + runtime-driven polish. The **godot-mcp-runtime**
server now drives in-game diagnostics and verification (run the game, walk the live
tree, screenshot) — every change this session was verified live.

**Last shipped (2026-06-28):** **V2 Briar puppy art wired into the game**
(`briar_v2_frames`, built from the chosen V2 sheets); **placeholder mode OFF by
default** so real sprites + painted backdrops show on boot; **readable UI text**
(stretch mode → `canvas_items`); **locked-door feedback** (rattle/flash) + a dedicated
`door_locked` SFX; the **hollow-house key is now a real find** (moved off the door);
and a **player sprint** — hold Shift for short bursts + auto-recovery, no stamina bar
(run anim = walk sped up). 399 tests green.

**Next:** Manual **Briar V2 animation polish** (clean the rough text-to-animate
cycles; draw the stand-in poses cower/dusk_press/head_bump/lie_down); art for the
remaining graybox entities; Echo (bird) art when ready; tune the dusk lighting if it
reads too dark. Open backdrop decision still pending.

**Watch out for:** build now defaults to real art (flip `debug/placeholder_mode` true
to re-run the shape/navigation playtest). `canvas_items` smooths text but scales pixel
sprites non-integer (watch for shimmer). Briar's anims are rough drafts. Only
`/home/seitanist/cycle_of_innocence` is canonical (stale `game/` copies mislead).
<!-- narrative:end -->
